name: Rebuke Death
targets: 1 living creature per action spent to Cast this Spell
description:
You snatch creatures from the jaws of death, restoring them without the straing of a typical close call. You can spend 1 to 3 actions Casting this Spell, and you can target a number of creatures equal to the actions spent. Each target regains 3d6 Hit Points. If the target had the condition, coming back from Dying due to this healing doesn't increase its condition.

Heightened (+1) Increase the healing by 1d6.
